title: cotula alba
intro: Cotula alba, also known as White Buttons, is a perennial herb that belongs to the daisy family and is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin conditions, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Cotula alba include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or topical cream, and is often used in herbal remedies to soothe skin irritations and promote overall well-being.
